nasb.text: For if you are careful to keep all this commandment which I am commanding you to do, to love the Lord your God, to walk in all His ways and hold fast to Him,

esv.text: For if you will be careful to do all this commandment that I command you to do, loving the Lord your God, walking in all his ways, and holding fast to him,

cnv.text: 如果你們殷勤謹守遵行我吩咐你們的這一切誡命，愛耶和華你們的　神，行他的一切道路，又緊緊地依靠他，

ccb.text: 如果你们谨遵我吩咐你们的这一切诫命——爱你们的上帝耶和华，遵行祂的旨意，依靠祂，
